theme_notes: Taglines drawn from the New York Knicks' first NBA championship since 1973 and their parade down Fifth Avenue today, Ukraine's largest-ever drone strike on Moscow, Trump's approval rating hitting a record low (new NPR poll), Olivia Rodrigo's third album 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love,' and the US Open teeing off at Shinnecock Hills.
settled: Zeroed out. More balanced than Trump's approval polls. Low bar, but you cleared it.
Clean slate. Even the Knicks waited 53 years for a moment this good.
Settled. Olivia Rodrigo seems pretty sad for a person so in love. You seem fine.
youOwe: Under $50. Still more embarrassing than Trump's approval rating. And that's saying something.
Less than a commemorative Knicks cup in Times Square. Which is already a crime against you.
Tiny. Ukraine launched 400 drones. You can't launch one Venmo request.
Enough to buy a Knicks championship shirt. Except it wouldn't cover your shame.
Olivia Rodrigo named her album 'you seem pretty sad.' She has sources inside this app.
Moscow took 400 drones in one night. Your partner took a $150 hit in silence.
The Knicks parade went down Fifth Avenue. Your finances are heading somewhere else entirely.
The US Open starts today at Shinnecock Hills. Your wallet is not in contention.
Trump's approval is at an all-time low. You've found something to beat him at.
Ukraine sent its largest drone strike of the war. This is the largest invoice of your relationship.
Scottie Scheffler is the favorite at Shinnecock Hills. You are not anyone's favorite right now.
Olivia Rodrigo's album has 12 tracks. At least 11 of them are about someone who owes $800.
The Knicks haven't won since 1973. Your payment came due around the same time.
For this amount you could have flown to the World Cup. Instead you're just sweating.
Trump's approval hit a record low. Your partner's confidence in you just matched it.
Ukraine's drone program costs less per month. And they're fighting an actual war.
The Knicks waited 53 years for their parade. Start planning for yours.
At these numbers the UN should be monitoring this relationship. And they'd side with your partner.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a Knicks parade pretzel. Screenshot it anyway.
Tiny. But so was Trump's margin for the truth, and look how that's going.
Almost nothing. 'Almost' is carrying this relationship right now.
They owe you a championship shirt. The Knicks just proved miracles happen.
Ukraine's drones got a response within hours. Your Venmo request: pending for weeks.
Olivia Rodrigo is 'pretty sad for a girl so in love.' You're pretty irritated for a person owed money.
The Knicks threw a parade. Your partner threw you an 'I'll get you back, promise.'
The US Open field assembled at Shinnecock Hills. Your money has not assembled anywhere.
Trump's approval hit a record low. Your generosity is approaching similar territory.
Almost a grand. Moscow got hit by 400 drones. You got hit with equal force.
The Knicks hadn't won since Ford was president. Your invoice dates to a similar era.
Olivia Rodrigo is 'so in love' but seems sad. You're owed $800 and feel both at once.
Scottie Scheffler has better odds at the US Open than you have of seeing this money.
The Knicks last won in 1973. This debt has the same vintage. Neither has aged well.
Trump made a deal with Iran. Your partner can't make a simple ACH transfer.
More than the Knicks parade staging cost. You're the one running the deficit.
Ukraine launched their biggest strike of the war for less than this. Think about that.
Olivia Rodrigo's whole album is about being sad while loved. Yours is about being broke while owed.
